raw_consumer_statement: My Costco anywhere visa card had been charged different amount each times since XXXX, but I didn't expect it until XX/XX/XXXX because I do use it most of times, I didn't realize I used a lot until I found it. I called to Costco about that, but they said they can only work on last 60 days, but they didn't call or noticed me about been charging different amount anytime. But they kept said 'sorry about that, but it's been over 60 days, there is nothing they can do '
